name: Semantic Tag Inference Engine
blurb: Foundation model reads RFID tags to infer object context, provenance, and handling instructions automatically.

name: Sodium-Tagged Supply Chain
blurb: RFID tags embedded in sodium-ion battery packs track charge cycles and cell health across logistics networks.

name: Zero-Drag Agent Transport
blurb: Superfluid channels carry software agents as physical signal pulses with no dissipation or latency.

name: Superfluid Wearable Cooling
blurb: Microscale superfluid loops wick body heat from wearables with zero-friction thermal transfer.

name: Self-Extending AI Backbone
blurb: Foundation model continuously rewrites its own architecture using downstream AI feedback loops.

name: Radiological Report Synthesizer
blurb: Foundation model reads raw MRI signal tensors and drafts clinical reports without radiologist queuing.

name: Cold Fusion Hypothesis Miner
blurb: Foundation model systematically tests low-energy nuclear reaction parameter spaces faster than any lab bench.

name: Recursive Capability Amplifier
blurb: Foundation model trains AGI successor agents using its own reasoning traces as curriculum data.

name: Embodied Context Fabric
blurb: Foundation model fuses continuous wearable sensor streams to maintain a persistent personal health narrative.

name: Fleet Cognition Layer
blurb: One foundation model simultaneously pilots thousands of autonomous vehicles, sharing learned edge cases instantly.

name: Geothermal Grid Negotiator
blurb: Autonomous agents bid and route geothermal power across regional grids in real time.

name: Persistent VR Caretaker
blurb: Intelligent agents maintain continuity and social dynamics inside virtual worlds when human users log off.

name: Lossless Reasoning Agent
blurb: Agent computation is fully reversible, enabling rollback of any decision and near-zero energy reasoning cycles.

name: Conversational Intent Daemon
blurb: Persistent agent parses ambient language to infer and execute user goals without explicit commands.

name: Emergent Swarm Protocol
blurb: Individual intelligent agents self-organize into multi-agent collectives with no central coordinator.

name: Adaptive Display Agent
blurb: Agent controls every pixel of an LCD surface, reconfiguring layout in response to user gaze and context.

name: Molecular Expert Router
blurb: Mixture-of-experts model selects specialist nanoscale synthesis pathways for each molecular target.

name: Deep-Earth Resonance Mapper
blurb: AI interprets seismic and thermal signatures to locate viable geothermal reservoirs with high precision.

name: Photonic AI Inference Chip
blurb: AI inference runs on photonic integrated circuits, cutting latency and power by orders of magnitude.

name: Metabolic Clone Calibration
blurb: Cloned tissue panels calibrate continuous glucose monitors to individual metabolic baselines precisely.

name: Carbon-Capture Organism Farm

name: Radiation Biomarker Screen

name: Orbital Reactor Deployment Network

name: Geothermal VR Operations Center

name: Subsurface Dialogue Interface

name: Distributed Geothermal Mesh

name: Heat-Flow Visualization Panel

name: Sodium-Powered Document Relay

name: Vactrain Fare Ledger

name: Graphene Neuromorphic Fabric
